title: Worfkflow blocks creation
excerpt: I am trying to create a workflow block. But when I fill all the api configuration for the trigger and I hit the create trigger button nothing happens. I don’t understand why.

posts.author: raki (Raki Diallo)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create a workflow block. But when I fill all the api configuration for the trigger and I hit the create trigger button nothing happens. I don’t understand why.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you saying you click the “create trigger” button to save the trigger, nothing happens?

  1. Confirm you are editing a draft app version, not live. You cannot edit live versions, for obvious reasons.
  2. If you just created the new feature, on the feature details page, make sure you have saved the feature with its new name, etc. first.

If you are instead saying you have created the trigger, and used it in a recipe on a board, but it does not trigger - how are you triggering it?

posts.author: raki (Raki Diallo)
posts.cookedHtml: I confirm I clicked the “create trigger” button to save the trigger and nothing happened and I am editing a draft app version, not live.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it a brand new app feature? Did you save the feature after creating it? Oddly if you don’t save it, it lets you go over to trigger but you can’t save the trigger (or action) because the feature itself isn’t saved.

image645×877 28.7 KB

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @raki

Thanks for reaching out to the community! It is important to combine the created API configuration with a previous action or trigger command programmed inside an app. This allows you to encapsulate workflows so they can be live in the app recipes section and also within your automation center. The latest monday apps framework offers features to help programmers build their own workflow blocks.

If you’re looking to build hassle-free monday apps, hire developers from a recognized monday.com consulting company. These developers can leverage the framework effectively and help you get the most out of your applications.
